reviews.comment:
Es del Automovil Club Argentino... no se puede esperar menos. Empleados educados y colaboradores, lugar limpio.
Solo deberian agregar comida Apta Celíacos

(Translated by Google)
It's from the Argentine Automobile Club... you'd expect nothing less. Polite and helpful employees, clean place.
They should just add gluten-free food.
